Repair path for Clownfish inventory live-pr-inventory-20260617T075124-003.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87560 by Pluviobyte.

Plan:
- Keep the contributor branch as the repair target because maintainer_can_modify is true.
- Investigate and fix the failing checks-node-auto-reply-core-top-level job without broadening the RTL isolation scope.
- Re-run the shared text tests and pnpm check:changed.
- Run Codex /review and address any findings before merge reconsideration.

Credit: this repair preserves attribution for the original source PR and author.
